market_share.category: Solana DEX Volume (7d, among AMMs excl. aggregators)

dev_ecosystem.monthly_active_devs: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — Electric Capital's 2024 Developer Report provides Solana ecosystem totals (~2,200 monthly active devs on Solana) but does not break out per-protocol figures for Orca specifically on the free public report PDF.
dev_ecosystem.full_time_devs: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — same reason as above; Orca's GitHub (github.com/orca-so) shows ~8 public repos with recent commits from a small core team estimated at 10–20 engineers, but exact headcount not disclosed.

switching_cost_analysis: Switching costs are LOW for end-users (Jupiter aggregator routes around Orca automatically) but MODERATE for integrators who have directly embedded Orca's Whirlpools SDK, since migrating concentrated-liquidity pool logic requires re-auditing smart-contract integrations and rewriting position-management code.
rationale: Orca pioneered concentrated liquidity (Whirlpools) on Solana and retains a strong SDK/integration moat with 35+ documented integrations (wallets, aggregators, yield protocols), but Raydium's CLMM launch and Meteora's dynamic pools have eroded Orca's TVL lead, pushing it to roughly #3 on Solana by TVL as of mid-2025. Regulatory risk is similar to all non-custodial Solana DEXes — no KYC, permissionless pools — placing it in the same SEC/CFTC grey zone as peers. Developer mindshare on Solana is growing (Electric Capital 2024 report cites Solana as the #2 ecosystem by monthly active devs), which benefits Orca but also intensifies competition.
sources: https://defillama.com/chain/Solana — Solana TVL breakdown by protocol, accessed 2025-07-10
https://defillama.com/dexs/chains/Solana — Solana DEX volume rankings, accessed 2025-07-10
https://github.com/orca-so — Orca public repositories and commit activity, accessed 2025-07-10
https://www.orca.so/whitepaper — Orca Whirlpools documentation and integration list
https://dev.orca.so — Orca developer docs listing SDK integrations
https://electriccapital.com/developer-report — Electric Capital 2024 Developer Report (free PDF), Solana ecosystem figures
https://coingecko.com/en/coins/orca — ORCA market cap (note: ORCA market cap ~$60–80M range; JUP/RAY from same source)
NOTE: DAU and 30d revenue figures for individual Solana DEXes are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER on Token Terminal (paywalled) and DefiLlama does not expose per-protocol DAU on free tier.
